sections.paragraph:
(“whom Jehovah hid,” i.e. defended), [Zephaniah], pr.n. LXX. Σοφονίας. Vulg. Sophonias (for צְפַנְיָה).-

(1) of a prophet, who takes the ninth place among the twelve minor prophets, Zep 1:1.-(2) of a priest, Jer 21:1 29:25 , 29 Jer 29:29, called צְפַנְיָהוּ, Jer 37:3 52:24 .-(3) Zec 6:10, 14 Zec 6:14.-(4) 1Ch 6:21, for which there is אוּרִיאֵל 1Ch 6:9 15:5 , 21 1Ch 15:21.
